title: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences Result 2026

detail.title: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences Result 2026
detail.short_info: Dr. NTRUHS Result 2026 Out for MPT 1st & 2nd Year Exam on the official website - uhsap.in on 08 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Dr. NTRUHS result.

sections.heading: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences Result 2026

content.text: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences (Dr. NTRUHS) Result 2026 has been officially released for MPT 1st Year and 2nd Year examinations conducted in March 2026. Students who appeared for these PG medical courses can now check their results online.

Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - http://uhsap.in/. The results are available for various postgraduate courses including Master of Physiotherapy (MPT). Students need to enter their hall ticket number or login credentials to access and download their scorecards.
Candidates are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their results. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the university authorities for correction.

Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences has released the latest MPT 1st and 2nd Year results for the March 2026 session. Students can now access their results online through the official portal using their login credentials.

rows: Dr. NTR University of Health Sciences

content.text: Dr. NTRUHS has activated the direct links to check MPT 1st and 2nd Year results for the March 2026 session. Students can instantly view and download their results through the official portal using the links provided below.

links.label: Dr. NTRUHS MPT 1st Year Exam March 2026 Results
Dr. NTRUHS MPT 2nd Year Exam March 2026 Results

sections.heading: How to Check Dr. NTRUHS Result 2026

content.text: Follow these simple steps to check and download your Dr. NTRUHS MPT Result 2026:

items: Visit the official result portal - http://results.uhsap.in/
Click on the relevant MPT 1st Year or 2nd Year result link
Enter your Hall Ticket Number or required login credentials
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference
